draft_v1: {"schema_v":1,"recipe":{"title":"FOOLPROOF HOLLANDAISE SAUCE","description":"NOTE : Cooled hollandaise can be very carefully reheated over the lowest-possible heat while whisking constantly. Hollandaise can't be refrigerated and then reheated."},"steps":[{"instruction":"1. Add the egg yolks, lemon juice, and hot water to the blender cup (or a cup that will just barely hold the head of your blender).","ingredient_lines":[]},{"instruction":"2. Melt the butter in a small saucepan over medium-low heat and continue to heat until the butter just begins to bubble and registers 180°F to 190°F on an instant-read thermometer. Transfer it to a liquid measuring cup, leaving the thin layer of whitish liquid behind (discard it).","ingredient_lines":[]}]}
